Research Interests

AI Systems & Agent Architecture

Multi-agent orchestration, MCP servers, A2A pipelines, and autonomous AI workflows at enterprise scale.

Business Intelligence & Market Systems

200 years of business evolution patterns, market disruption cycles, and how AI transforms competitive landscapes.

Applied AI for Search & Discovery

RAG engines, knowledge graphs, answer engine optimization, and the future of information retrieval.

Research → Product
